Assessment of Mental Status - Short Term Memory Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's short term memory ability. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Memory OK
2=Memory problem
^=Blank (skip pattern)
105 C0800_LT_MEMRY_CD C0800_LT_MEMRY_CD C0800 Staff Assessment of Mental Status - Long Term Memory Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's long term memory ability. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Memory OK
2=Memory problem
^=Blank (skip pattern)
106
